title: Associate Engine Programmer
description:
Overview:
Rockstar San Diego seeks a talented Associate Engine Programmer interested in low-level game technology. The role involves working on core systems that power modern video games, based permanently at the Carlsbad studio.

What The Engine Team Does:
The Engine team comprises generalist programmers focused on lower-level systems and hardware optimization. Responsibilities include memory management, efficient game data streaming, population systems, LOD, scene management, rendering pipeline, scripting engine, and collaboration with Graphics and Art teams on vegetation, lighting, and occlusion systems.

Responsibilities:
- Implement new core technologies necessary to realize game vision
- Maintain existing codebase and support wider development team in diagnosing problems and developing solutions

Qualifications:
- Computer Science degree or equivalent experience

Required Skills:
- Understanding of computing fundamentals and related terminology
- Demonstrable C/C++ programming experience
- Excellent problem-solving skills with an emphasis on debugging C++ code
- Positive collaboration with other departments across Rockstar studios
- Strong multi-threaded programming skills
- Analytical measurement of system performance and memory use

Desirable Skills:
- Self-motivation and passion for games
- SIMD code experience
- Memory layout considerations (padding and cache efficiency)
- Crash dumps and x86 disassembly experience
- Strong 3D math skills
- Code performance understanding including algorithmic complexity (big O notation)
